name: Donald J. Trump
subject: FINISH THE WALL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I’ll be in El Paso TODAY. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=47a26729bddfe8271be55dd46fec54f7b4ffd4682a488b9677d61e4f01fb574252a0d28c173207b4611ecfc9e5f35f291647a63028c9439f)
---

Friend,

I'm headed to El Paso, Texas, today for a huge rally at our Southern Border to show Democrats how much Americans demand _THE WALL._

While Democrats refuse to acknowledge the crisis at our Southern Border, the safety of Americans is threatened every day....

Just last week, an MS-13 gang member was taken into custody for a fatal shooting on a subway platform in New York City. We're removing these gang members by the thousands, _**but until we secure our border they're going to keep streaming back in.**_

Even with this knowledge, Democrats have chosen petty games over the safety of Americans.

During my State of the Union Address, I called for unity, asking Democrats to finally choose _greatness_ over _gridlock._

With Congress' deadline to fund the wall on February 15th, I need you to help put pressure on the Democrats and become an Official Build the Wall Member.

| **[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to become an Official Build The Wall Member and get on the list my team sends me tonight. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bcb5d87f7d004b5e78718c18a6d68b59a330a61b0b1963edfe25b786ea21d334c31faeda0d4381d0b31c9556d47a67c987)** **[Official Build The Wall Membership](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc8a79f56ec1ad6af751a2395b5f07865c37ff5ae2747e4b9518e7057c1e06a4aa223927c20ec921f72becb02b2910c8cb)** **EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc8bd6c207c9c1143af963064e3448ea484af7a43d907dbffd441eac5db0e9fcfe5a4368ec5b59341d5f689162ff307dba)**
**ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT**
**MEMBERSHIP:****PENDING** ************************[ **CONTRIBUTE $5** ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc23d9b0a96e129f2e75085f640378800617db9d5068544fae2a374e9c3083a00e11c85859842e1743df3519691ef8eda3)************************
[CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc56897bfa1232c537589260bc52c55af4101e4229e8ff6f9738cd603637fd6dd382b21e04d40261dcfff83c7b6b7ccee8) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc70d12eb9f3b323ff05a5a10461d9a10306657fb94ad8103cf1eb746977044bfaa5d4a17030caf002469640ae6a69deeb) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc278280dc61fd5fdedf7b23569bf2ea1b317e27c574335bd17ef8b126d3534d598b936580d8c25553abac2ad1b9d91b1b) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc0f48309d121b43d62d656d09589530b27217b2720b3fee6489ec17867f93ec29ef56cd17c5a3ebd800dd748c8601d538) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc8e2a884e4adb218ac17fde109ad54dc006a0197994c2b79ccc35949974a264ac2191a014502eea7feab60e6e18824f2d) The time for action is NOW, we can't sit back and continue to let the Democrats put the safety of American citizens at risk.

Go down in history as an Official Build The Wall Member, and be remembered for being one of the American Patriots that helped FINISH THE WALL.

**[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to become an Official Build The Wall Member and get on the list my team sends me tonight.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc127e2d0b654fd0e75f223a2582e46ea7d7378aef8a56a95eeecdd3730d5127c4616c954297ea07f4c3298d34fff976ea)**

Thank you, [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca47c0102ed4d5bc8e4a9c4209fea566d1e9f39e0e6eb3c7bd79a31c1a0070849c3493b04988c6b68c4a78db3158d87617b6cec969d9ef56)
Donald J. Trump

name: Mike Siegel
subject: I am going to El Paso
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755122/39299595/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=)
---
Peter, Today my campaign manager and I are making the drive from Austin to El Paso, to join with community organizations, Rep. Veronica Escobar, Beto O'Rourke, and hopefully many many more, for the ["March for Truth: Stop the Wall, Stop the Lies."](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755123/39299596/1350070832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=)

Although El Paso lies far beyond the Texas 10th Congressional District, I believe this is a critical moment in our nation's history. President Trump shut down our government for 35 days to try to force Congress to fund a Border Wall. In his State of the Union address, he told numerous lies in an attempt to justify Wall funding. And now he is heading to El Paso on Monday night, to hold another hate rally for national consumption. I stand opposed to the Wall. It is a symbol of hate. It is a useless and wasteful attempt to address the challenges of immigration. [**Send me to Congress and I will stand up for immigrant communities. We can't allow this symbol of hate to be built. Donate and I will make sure Texas never sees Trump's wall.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755124/39299597/-917578712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=&refcode=em021019&emci=e9d6ebc4-152e-e911-b8b3-281878392e89&emdi=ead6ebc4-152e-e911-b8b3-281878392e89&ceid=6233172) | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755125/39299598/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=&refcode=em021019)
---
I am hopeful, and encouraged, by the work of local human rights organizations that organized the March for Truth. And when Beto announced that he was building for the event as well, I knew it is an opportunity: to show a different Texas to the world, one that embraces our multi-national heritage and celebrates how immigration makes us stronger in so many ways. I hope you will support this work. This action today — similar to our actions last week to protect voting rights — represents the type of campaign that I want to run. A campaign that fights for what is right, and uses the platform we have to help people along the way.
[**Our campaign will always fight for what is right. We need your support to take this campaign all the way to the halls of Congress. Donate now so we can take this fight to Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755126/39299599/-917578712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=&refcode=em021019&emci=e9d6ebc4-152e-e911-b8b3-281878392e89&emdi=ead6ebc4-152e-e911-b8b3-281878392e89&ceid=6233172)
Make sure to like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755127/39299600/729498802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=) to see live footage from the March. You can also check our [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755128/39299601/-1886619472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=) and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755129/39299602/1519942209?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=) for photos and commentary. If you can't join us in El Paso, we hope that you will spread the word that the biggest event happening is not the President's arrival, but the movement of the people committed to unity, decency and love.
Thank you,
Mike
* * *
**[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755130/39299603/-1950142826?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=) [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755131/39299604/862725720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=) [Campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755132/39299605/-1686464446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=)** [ Donate Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4755133/39299606/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2ZWJjNC0xNTJlLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcZHb1uB8L6lyaxLWj4M8nzAd3kn-20EET_1vt2tiGM=&refcode=embutton)

name: Cheri Bustos
subject: I’ve got Abigail's back, do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter, I wanted you to hear the news from me first: I just added Abigail Spanberger to the DCCC's Frontline program -- our list of vital Democratic incumbents who are critical in our mission to protect our Majority in 2020.
| | Peter,

I wanted you to hear the news from me first: I just added Abigail Spanberger to the DCCC's Frontline Program -- our list of vital Democratic incumbents who are critical in our mission to protect our Majority in 2020.

I need to be frank in this really big moment: [**Will you help Abigail build on this incredible momentum by chipping in a grassroots donation to her campaign today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEqHIumoEhf-blfzSnyNEc0exx9ARjdGY8KaMPbZ0Nw=/TObww3kcbP5ZAn_QlS2i-D62ucEDMVDgyXrkG1VzWbE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.11_b1_cb_all&amount=25)

After our historic election in 2018, we gained an incredible group of Democrats, like Abigail, who entered the halls of Congress with one mission in mind: **to help improve the lives of the people she represents in Virginia.**

Peter, Abigail has been a fearless advocate in our fight for health care, for accountability, and for the protection of every American's right to use their voice at the ballot box. And truthfully, it's up to us to make sure Abigail remains a powerful voice for each and every one of us in our nation's capital.

But Abigail's path to victory won't be easy. She's up against powerful special interests, who are prepared to do (_and spend_) whatever it takes to rip this Democratic seat from all of us who worked so hard to elect Abigail.

**We need to show them that we have Abigail 's back -- and are ready to step up to fight for someone who works tirelessly to promote our Democratic priorities.**

[**So, Peter, can Abigail and I count on your support today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEqHIumoEhf-blfzSnyNEc0exx9ARjdGY8KaMPbZ0Nw=/TObww3kcbP5ZAn_QlS2i-D62ucEDMVDgyXrkG1VzWbE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.11_b1_cb_all&amount=25)

Thanks for all you do,

Cheri Bustos
Chairwoman, DCCC

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEqHIumoEhf-blfzSnyNEc0exx9ARjdGY8KaMPbZ0Nw=/TObww3kcbP5ZAn_QlS2i-D62ucEDMVDgyXrkG1VzWbE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.11_b1_cb_all&amount=25)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEqHIumoEhf-blfzSnyNEc0exx9ARjdGY8KaMPbZ0Nw=/1qh9hMZSs63e3ewxuTEVH3YVbuOHkQFUHsuFfv-l4mI=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---

PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

clean_body: Peter, I wanted you to hear the news from me first: I just added Abigail Spanberger to the DCCC's Frontline program -- our list of vital Democratic incumbents who are critical in our mission to protect our Majority in 2020. | | Peter, I wanted you to hear the news from me first: I just added Abigail Spanberger to the DCCC's Frontline Program -- our list of vital Democratic incumbents who are critical in our mission to protect our Majority in 2020. I need to be frank in this really big moment: After our historic election in 2018, we gained an incredible group of Democrats, like Abigail, who entered the halls of Congress with one mission in mind: to help improve the lives of the people she represents in Virginia. Peter, Abigail has been a fearless advocate in our fight for health care, for accountability, and for the protection of every American's right to use their voice at the ballot box. And truthfully, it's up to us to make sure Abigail remains a powerful voice for each and every one of us in our nation's capital. But Abigail's path to victory won't be easy. She's up against powerful special interests, who are prepared to do (and spend) whatever it takes to rip this Democratic seat from all of us who worked so hard to elect Abigail. We need to show them that we have Abigail 's back -- and are ready to step up to fight for someone who works tirelessly to promote our Democratic priorities. Thanks for all you do, Cheri Bustos Chairwoman, DCCC Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit = | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

body:
For building THE WALL. |

Friend,

Today, President Trump is hosting one of the most important rallies EVER.

He'll be in El Paso, Texas, with just 4 days until Congress' critical deadline to _FUND THE WALL._

The President was disappointed your name wasn't on the first list of Official Build the Wall Members we sent him the other day.

Our movement to Build The Wall started when the President took his famous escalator ride to announce his presidential campaign. Today is the day you can be one of the American Patriots that finished the job and BUILT THE WALL.

**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** Headed to THE WALL
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca9f19b5e11e718e9fa3a35d01801003b5a2c5fb9f68f28c113ae4e99f7cb387b0c2217e3056a802b01a7e9f271a942f21c67a3f4d76d36b)**

Friend,

I'm headed to El Paso, Texas, in just 2 days for a huge rally at our Southern Border to show Democrats how much Americans demand _THE WALL._

While Democrats refuse to acknowledge the crisis at our Southern Border, the safety of Americans is threatened every day....

Just a few days ago, an MS-13 gang member was taken into custody for a fatal shooting on a subway platform in New York City. We're removing these gang members by the thousands, _**but until we secure our border they're going to keep streaming back in.**_

Even with this knowledge, Democrats have chosen petty games over the safety of Americans.

During my State of the Union Address, I called for unity, asking Democrats to finally choose _greatness_ over _gridlock._

With Congress' deadline to fund the wall on February 15th, I need you to help put pressure on the Democrats and become an Official Build the Wall Member.

| **[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to become an Official Build The Wall Member and get on the list my team sends me tonight. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca9f19b5e11e718e8519f860706d49007fb3c393624f99643d42722ed2e4212b5e9f01a83be3d7e36edf055363b9895605d5c077834b7b04)** **[Official Build The Wall Membership](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca9f19b5e11e718e1b367e2879f326d5df1297a38f7b84600c8f1e48156ca1a96c7b2b0fd008b9e5c81f0253069ef09555685f2d9dca0adf)** **EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca9f19b5e11e718efeb6b26d9820fa25993a752b1e297b12d0c621bc5ede6a3e33044bec3b8f7a5d3ef3fb8e498bdc6f44adec8b986a6281)**

Go down in history as an Official Build The Wall Member, and be remembered for being one of the American Patriots that helped FINISH THE WALL.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Boom: Best Economic Optimism in 16 years, 50% ‘Better Off’ Under President Trump
body:
"Public optimism in their personal economy has hit a 16-year high under President Trump, according to a new survey." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6fa8ffe94d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Boom: Best Economic Optimism in 16 years, 50% ‘Better Off’ Under President Trump**

“Public optimism in their personal economy has hit a 16-year high under President Trump, according to a new survey. Some 69 percent told Gallup that they expect their personal finances to be even better next year,” Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“What’s more, the survey company said that 50 percent believe they are ‘better off’ than just a year ago when the current economic surge was kicking in. . . Gallup said that is the first time the level has reach 50 percent since 2007.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc2de7af80&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e86fdddeed&e=3ee4985eea)_ , David Harsanyi writes that “impartial” fact-checkers are revealing their blatant partisanship against President Trump. “With a veneer of impartiality, fact-checkers often engage in a uniquely dishonest style of partisanship. And State of Union coverage gave us an abundance of examples of how they do it.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd178308ee&e=3ee4985eea)_ , former House Speaker Newt Gingrich and health policy expert Joe DeSantis write that the Trump Administration’s plan to lower drug costs will “be a significant step toward fixing the health care system in America.” They explain that “not only will this plan save patients money at the pharmacy counter, it will begin to fix the broken economics of drug pricing that cause the huge increases in prices and out-of-pocket costs we have witnessed over the past decades.”
---
|
---
| Last week, “President Trump unveiled a new White House initiative — the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative,” Christopher Barron writes in _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c63d1742f0&e=3ee4985eea)_. Spearheaded by Ivanka Trump, this first-ever government-wide initiative of its kind “aims to help 50 million women in developing countries realize their economic potential.” Barron adds that it’s also a positive step toward an “America First” foreign policy—and it’s the right time for initiatives like W-GDP that “spread American values of liberty and freedom to every corner of the globe.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23f3f1ee90&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c0ebcb1ae&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=acbfab07aa)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Some 69 percent told Gallup that they expect their personal finances to be even better next year,” Paul Bedard reports for the Washington Examiner. “What’s more, the survey company said that 50 percent believe they are ‘better off’ than just a year ago when the current economic surge was kicking in. . . name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats, listen to law enforcement—not your base
body:
“I’m here to say thank you,” Vice President Mike Pence told U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials on Friday in Baltimore, Maryland.

https://www.whitehouse.gov/1600daily/
The White House • February 11, 2019

** Democrats, listen to law enforcement—not your base
------------------------------------------------------------
“I’m here to say thank you,” Vice President Mike Pence told U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials on Friday in Baltimore, Maryland. “But I’m also here to learn more about the work that each and every one of you do.”

Our immigration law enforcement officers have one of the toughest jobs in America. They are the first lines of defense against drug cartels, human traffickers, and other forms of transnational crime. It’s dangerous work that keeps our communities safe.

These officers are the experts when it comes to border security. They know what works and what doesn’t. Politicians should listen to them—not scapegoat them to cover for Congress’ own outdated, ineffective laws.

Congressional Democrats disagree. Amid calls to abolish U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/abolishing-ice-erase-americas-borders-open-floodgates-crime-drugs-terrorism/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) entirely, now immigration officers can’t even make their voices heard. “A briefer from U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement stood outside the closed-door meeting [last] Wednesday while negotiators working on a homeland security spending deal heard from border experts,” The Washington Times reports.

“The ICE briefer never made it in the room.”

Dozens of sheriffs arrived on Capitol Hill today to plead with Democrats not to cut resources for immigration enforcement. This afternoon, President Donald J. Trump met with a group of these local law enforcement leaders at the White House. “This is what we do,” one sheriff told reporters in the room. “If you do anything to cut ICE funding, you devastate our communities.”

Watch: Call it whatever you want, but without a wall, “it’s not going to work.” (https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1095081617561927680)

President Trump: “This is a humanitarian and security crisis.” (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-committed-working-congress-solve-urgent-immigration-crisis/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

** American artificial intelligence will lead the world
------------------------------------------------------------
Today, President Trump launched his American AI Initiative, directing Federal agencies to prioritize investments in the research and development of artificial intelligence.

“Continued American leadership in Artificial Intelligence is of paramount importance to maintaining the economic and national security of the United States,” the President says. Indeed, this investment is crucial to creating the industries of the future, such as autonomous cars, industrial robots, algorithms for disease diagnosis, and more.

AI promises great benefits for American workers, with the potential to improve safety and increase productivity. Additionally, maintaining America’s global leadership in AI will ensure that the technology is developed in a manner consistent with our Nation’s values, policies, and priorities—including the civil liberties of our people.

5 keys to accelerating American leadership in artificial intelligence (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/accelerating-americas-leadership-in-artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

Get the facts: President Trump is advancing American AI capabilities (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-is-accelerating-americas-leadership-in-artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
President Donald J. Trump signs the Executive Order on “Maintaining American Leadership in Artificial Intelligence” | February 11, 2018

Privacy Policy (https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | Contact the White House (https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact/) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c0fcac3c11)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

Indeed, this investment is crucial to creating the industries of the future, such as autonomous cars, industrial robots, algorithms for disease diagnosis, and more. AI promises great benefits for American workers, with the potential to improve safety and increase productivity. Additionally, maintaining America’s global leadership in AI will ensure that the technology is developed in a manner consistent with our Nation’s values, policies, and priorities—including the civil liberties of our people. 5 keys to accelerating American leadership in artificial intelligence () Get the facts: President Trump is advancing American AI capabilities () ** Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Joyce N.
